howItWorks.title: Our Power Path
howItWorks.intro: Follow the path to restored power. We make electrical maintenance as simple as clearing a stage.

steps.title: Tell Us the Problem
steps.description: Send details through the contact page, including the issue, location, photos if helpful, and preferred timing.

steps.title: Get Clear Direction
steps.description: We review the request, ask the right questions, and explain the likely next steps before work begins.

steps.title: Safe Electrical Work
steps.description: The job is completed with safety, clean workmanship, and respect for your home or business.

steps.title: Power Restored
steps.description: We review the completed work, answer questions, and make sure the area is left clean and functional.

services.intro: Electrical problems can feel stressful, especially when they affect safety, comfort, or business operations. Power Pellet Electric provides practical electrical services for homes, rental properties, offices, shops, and small commercial spaces.

items.title: Residential Electrical Service
items.description: Electrical support for homeowners who need repairs, upgrades, installations, troubleshooting, or safety improvements. This can include outlets, switches, lighting, circuits, panels, smoke detectors, and general electrical concerns.

items.title: Commercial Electrical Service
items.description: Electrical support for offices, storefronts, studios, clinics, restaurants, and small commercial spaces. Services can include lighting, wiring, troubleshooting, outlet placement, code-aware improvements, and electrical maintenance.

items.title: Panel Upgrades
items.description: Panel upgrades help properties handle today's electrical demand. A panel upgrade may be needed for renovations, EV chargers, new appliances, basement units, additions, or frequent breaker issues.

items.title: Breaker and Circuit Troubleshooting
items.description: Breaker issues can point to overloaded circuits, faulty devices, damaged wiring, or unsafe electrical conditions. Troubleshooting helps identify the source before bigger problems develop.

items.title: Lighting Installation
items.description: Lighting installation for kitchens, basements, bathrooms, offices, exteriors, garages, security areas, and feature spaces. Work can include recessed lighting, fixtures, dimmers, outdoor lights, and lighting upgrades.

items.title: EV Charger Installation Prep
items.description: EV charger preparation can include reviewing panel capacity, planning a dedicated circuit, choosing charger placement, and installing safe wiring for home or business charging needs.

items.title: Electrical Safety Inspections
items.description: Safety inspections help identify risks such as outdated wiring, overloaded circuits, damaged outlets, improper connections, missing protection, warm switches, and other electrical warning signs.

items.title: Surge Protection
items.description: Surge protection helps protect electronics, appliances, office equipment, smart home devices, and electrical systems from damaging voltage spikes.

items.title: Wiring and Rewiring
items.description: Wiring and rewiring services for renovations, finished basements, additions, appliance circuits, office layouts, damaged wiring, and safer electrical upgrades.

items.title: Emergency Electrical Support
items.description: Urgent electrical issues may include burning smells, sparks, power loss, repeated breaker trips, warm outlets, buzzing panels, exposed wires, or unsafe electrical conditions.

bento.title: PRECISION GRID CONTROL
bento.description: Our technicians utilize high-fidelity mapping to ensure every pellet of power reaches its destination without loss.

about.intro: Power Pellet Electric was built around a simple idea: electrical work should feel clear, safe, and respectful from the first message to the final walkthrough.

sections.title: Safety Comes First
sections.description: Electrical work affects the safety of your home, family, employees, customers, and property. Every service is approached with careful attention to the issue, the environment, and the long-term reliability of the solution.

sections.title: Clean Work Matters
sections.description: A good electrical job should not leave a mess behind. Work areas are treated with respect, finished details are considered, and cleanup is part of the customer experience.

sections.title: Honest Communication
sections.description: Customers should understand what is happening, why it matters, and what options are available. Power Pellet Electric focuses on clear explanations instead of confusing technical pressure.

sections.title: Licensed Expertise
sections.description: Electrical systems are not a place for guesswork. The work is handled with professional care, proper process, and safety-focused decision making.

sections.title: Local Service
sections.description: The company supports local homeowners, landlords, property managers, and small businesses that need dependable electrical service without feeling like another ticket number.

sections.title: Respectful Customer Care
sections.description: From quick questions to larger upgrades, the goal is to make customers feel heard, informed, and confident about the electrical work being completed.

valuesSection.title: Power Up Features
valuesSection.intro: The core values that drive our system forward and keep the power flowing efficiently across every circuit we touch.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Level?
cta.body: Whether it's a simple repair or a full system upgrade, we're here to provide the precision your project requires.

contact.intro: Use the contact page to request a quote, ask about a service, explain an electrical issue, or request priority support.

afterSubmit.title: Request Received
afterSubmit.description: Your message is reviewed so the electrical issue, property type, and service need are understood.

afterSubmit.title: Follow-Up Questions
afterSubmit.description: If needed, we ask for photos, extra details, timing, or access information before recommending next steps.

afterSubmit.title: Quote or Visit
afterSubmit.description: Depending on the request, you receive quote guidance, scheduling options, or a recommendation for an on-site review.

afterSubmit.title: Work Completed
afterSubmit.description: Electrical work is completed with safety, clean workmanship, and clear communication.

emergencyNotice.title: Electrical Emergency?
emergencyNotice.description: If there are sparks, smoke, burning smells, exposed live wires, or immediate danger, stay away from the area and contact emergency services or your utility provider when appropriate.

resources.intro: Helpful guides for homeowners and business owners who want to better understand electrical warning signs, upgrades, safety basics, and when to call a professional.

articles.title: Panel Upgrade Guide
articles.description: Learn when an electrical panel may need an upgrade, including signs like frequent breaker trips, limited capacity, renovation plans, EV charger installation, new appliances, or outdated equipment.

articles.title: Breaker Troubleshooting Basics
articles.description: Understand why breakers trip, what overloaded circuits can look like, when a device may be the issue, and when repeated trips should be checked by an electrician.

articles.title: Home Electrical Safety Checklist
articles.description: Review common safety items such as warm outlets, damaged cords, overloaded power bars, flickering lights, buzzing switches, missing GFCI protection, and exposed wiring.

articles.title: EV Charger Prep Guide
articles.description: Learn what homeowners should consider before installing an EV charger, including panel capacity, charger location, dedicated circuits, permits, and future charging needs.

articles.title: Lighting Upgrade Guide
articles.description: Explore lighting upgrade ideas for kitchens, basements, bathrooms, exterior spaces, offices, garages, and security areas.

articles.title: When to Call an Electrician
articles.description: Know when an electrical issue should not be ignored, including burning smells, sparks, buzzing panels, frequent breaker trips, dead outlets, flickering lights, and warm switch plates.

resourceCTA.title: Not sure what the issue is?
resourceCTA.description: Send the details through the contact page and we can help point you in the right direction.
resourceCTA.label: Contact Us
